_comment: Curated, verified smart-money + KOL wallets on Robinhood Chain. Copy to watchlist.json and fill with addresses YOU have verified. The radar tags any on-chain signal from these wallets with the label below. Never add an address you haven't checked on the explorer — a wrong 'smart money' tag is worse than none.
_sources: https://robinhoodchain.blockscout.com  — official explorer: verify any address, its balance, and its trade history here first
https://thecognitiveos.com  — tracks 400+ scored smart-money wallets on Robinhood Chain (verify their picks yourself)
https://robinscan.xyz  — Robinhood Chain explorer + whale tracker
https://frontrun.pro  — 6M+ labelled KOL / smart-money wallets (Solana-first; use for KOL wallet discovery)
